summary: Action Reinforcement System testing completed successfully. All core features working: (1) ReinforcementToast appears at bottom-center with dark glass styling on right-swipe and drag-drop actions, (2) ParticleBurst animation visible on cards during swipe action, (3) Toast auto-dismisses after ~3 seconds, (4) Context-aware messages generated based on action type and priority level.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: ReinforcementToast correctly renders via React portal to document.body at bottom-center
PASS: Toast has dark glass styling (rgba(20,20,20,0.85) background, backdrop blur 12px)
PASS: Colored indicator dots work correctly (yellow/highImpact for Hero priorities, blue/momentum for stage changes)
PASS: Context-aware messages generated - 'This was the most important thing to do' for top priority swipe, 'Face time matters, well played' for campus_visit stage change
PASS: data-testid='reinforcement-toast' attribute present for testing
PASS: Toast auto-dismisses after 3 seconds (DISMISS_MS constant)
PASS: SwipeableCard handles mouse drag correctly with 80px threshold
PASS: ParticleBurst animation fires on swipe action (subtle scale 1→1.02→1 pulse visible)
PASS: Pipeline view toggle (Priority/Pipeline) works correctly
PASS: Kanban drag-and-drop triggers triggerReinforcement with stage change context
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - Emma Chen has Emory University (OVERDUE 3D) in Next Actions, UCLA/Florida/Stanford in Coming Up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Reinforcement System fully functional. ReinforcementToast and ParticleBurst components integrated in PipelinePage.js. triggerReinforcement() called on: (1) right-swipe on PriorityBoard cards via SwipePriorityCard, (2) drag-and-drop stage changes in KanbanBoard via handleDragEnd. Toast messages are contextual based on isHeroPriority, priorityRank, attentionLevel, and stageAfter values.

verified_features.1_login_as_emma_chen: PASS - Demo account login works via data-testid selectors
verified_features.2_priority_board_loads: PASS - Default view shows Priority Board with Next Actions, Coming Up, On Track sections
verified_features.3_emory_in_next_actions: PASS - Emory University card visible in 'Next Actions' with OVERDUE 3D badge
verified_features.4_right_swipe_triggers_reinforcement: PASS - Mouse drag >80px right triggers onAction callback
verified_features.5_reinforcement_toast_appears: PASS - Toast appears at bottom-center with dark glass styling
verified_features.6_toast_has_correct_styling: PASS - Dark background (rgba(20,20,20,0.85)), backdrop blur, colored indicator dot
verified_features.7_contextual_message_hero_priority: PASS - Shows 'This was the most important thing to do' + 'Follow up with Emory University'
verified_features.8_particle_burst_animation: PASS - Visible scale pulse (1→1.02→1) and particle effects on card during swipe
verified_features.9_pipeline_view_toggle: PASS - Clicking 'Pipeline' button shows Kanban Board
verified_features.10_drag_drop_triggers_reinforcement: PASS - Moving card to new column triggers toast 'Face time matters, well played' for campus_visit stage
verified_features.13_no_js_errors: PASS - No console errors during testing
